title: Astral Projection
wikitext:
[[File:Doctor Strange Astral Projection.jpg|thumb|420px|[[Doctor Strange (Marvel Comics)|Doctor Strange]] performing astral projection.]]

==Summary==
'''Astral Projection''' is the ability to separate one's spirit/soul from one's body. The user can exit their body and gain access to Astral Plane, where they can exist as a spirit. It allows the user to communicate and interact with spirits/souls.  

==Possible Uses==
* Leave the body to enter astral realm as a spirit/soul.
* Communicate and interact with souls.
* Ability to harm or destroy other souls.
* Travel to Hell, Heaven, or another spiritual realm.

==Users==
* [[Aang]], [[Korra]], and all other avatars ([[Avatar: The Last Airbender|Avatar]])
* [[Gwen Tennyson]] ([[Ben 10 (Classic)|Ben 10]])
* Shinigami via Gigai ([[Bleach]])
* [[Mavis Vermilion]] ([[Fairy Tail]])
* [[Doctor Strange (Marvel Comics)|Doctor Strange]] and [[Silver Surfer (Marvel Comics)|Silver Surfer]], among others ([[Marvel Comics]])
* [[Brook]] ([[One Piece]])
